title: The 3 Most Promising Utility Stocks to Own Now
text: Diving into the world of stocks, one might overlook steady performers in favor of flashier sectors. However, for those with a keen eye, promising utility stocks shimmer with potential in the vast landscape of equity investments.

title: Oklo and Centrus Energy Sign Memorandum of Understanding for Fuel, Components, and Power Procurement to Support the Deployment of Advanced Fission Technologies in Southern Ohio
text: PIKETON, Ohio , Aug. 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Oklo Inc. ("Oklo") and Centrus Energy Corp. ("Centrus") (NYSE American: LEU) today announced a new Memorandum of Understanding ("MOU") between the two companies to support the deployment of Oklo's advanced fission powerhouses and advanced nuclear fuel production in Southern Ohio, making the region a critical hub for the future of the U.S. nuclear industry. Oklo and Centrus have been partners since 2021 when the companies signed a Letter of Intent to cooperate in the development of a High-Assay, Low-Enriched Uranium ("HALEU") fuel facility.

title: 4 Dividend Stocks Yielding 4% to Buy and Hold for a Potential Lifetime of Income
text: Brookfield Renewable, Public Storage, Southern Company, and Stag Industrial all offer dividend yields above 4%. The companies support those above-average payouts by generating stable and growing cash flow.

title: 7 Very Oversold High-Yield Stocks to Buy Right Now
text: If you have the temptation to speculate, but are hesitant to go full bore into the madness of memes, oversold high-yield stocks to buy offer plenty of punch. Specifically, I'm focusing on well-established enterprises that just haven't aligned with market sentiment.

title: Southern's (SO) Vogtle Unit 4 Begins Nuclear Fuel Load
text: Southern's (SO) unit, Georgia Power ignites progress by commencing fuel loading in Vogtle Unit 4, a stride toward cleaner and more reliable energy solutions.

title: Dividend Lovers Bet Big on 6 ‘Strong Buy' Goldman Sachs Conviction List Picks for Rest of 2023

title: 3 Dividend Stocks That Can Generate Income for Life
text: The Southern Company hasn't cut its dividend in over 75 years, and with a big capital project coming to a close, it could start increasing the dividend at a faster rate. Clearway Energy's focus on clean energy positions it to generate decades of growing cash flow.

title: Vogtle Unit 4 starts nuclear fuel load
text: Milestone is pivotal prior to startup testing and commercial operation ATLANTA , Aug. 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Georgia Power announced today the process to load fuel into the Vogtle Unit 4 reactor core has begun at Plant Vogtle near Waynesboro, Ga. Loading fuel marks a pivotal milestone toward startup and commercial operation of the second new unit at Plant Vogtle.

title: Southern (SO) Beats on Q2 Earnings, Maintains Vogtle Timeline
text: Southern Company (SO) guided earnings per share of $3.55-$3.65 for this year and $1.30 for the September quarter.

title: 7 Dividend Stocks to Buy in July 2022
text: Dividend stocks are only becoming more attractive as income becomes increasingly paramount. These seven equities pair dividends with safety.

title: 7 Stocks to Buy Now to Beat the Inflation Blues
text: In June, annual inflation (from the most recent data) slipped to 3%, which on paper clashes with the concept of stocks to beat inflation. After all, NPR pointed out that the aforementioned statistic represented the lowest point since March 2021.

title: Southern Company: A Top-Tier Utility Yielding 4%, Trading 16% Below Its Highs
text: Southern Company achieves a major milestone with the launch of Vogtle Unit 3, becoming a leader in America's return to nuclear energy. The completion of Vogtle Unit 4 is progressing well, and the company is exploring opportunities in green hydrogen production. Despite challenges in the past, SO's commitment to reducing emissions and its solid dividend track record make it an attractive option for income-oriented investors.

title: The Southern Company: Buy, Sell, or Hold?
text: Southern has just linked the first new nuclear power plant in decades to the U.S. grid. There's one more nuclear power plant to go, which will likely go online in late 2023 or early 2024.

title: Southern Company: Long-Term Buy For One Of The Sector's Best Regulatory Profiles
text: Southern Company's share price has slightly outperformed the sector due to the partial completion of the Vogtle nuclear power plant. Southern Company serves millions of electric and gas customers across multiple states. The trend towards Performance-Based Regulation in the utility sector makes Southern Company an attractive investment due to its supportive regulatory environment.

title: The Southern Company (SO) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: The Southern Company (NYSE:SO ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call August 3, 2023 1:00 PM ET Company Participants Scott Gammill - Vice President, Investor Relations and Treasurer Chris Womack - President & Chief Executive Officer Dan Tucker - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Shahriar Pourreza - Guggenheim Partners Carly Davenport - Goldman Sachs Julien Dumoulin-Smith - Bank of America Jeremy Tonet – JPMorgan David Arcaro - Morgan Stanley Durgesh Chopra - Evercore ISI Nick Campanella - Barclays Angie Storozynski - Seaport Operator Good afternoon. My name is Tommy, and I will be your conference operator today.

title: Southern Co. (SO) Q2 Earnings: How Key Metrics Compare to Wall Street Estimates
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Southern Co. (SO) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Southern Co. (SO) Tops Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: Southern Co. (SO) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.79 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.74 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.07 per share a year ago.

title: 100% of Chattanooga Gas' fuel supply for residential and small business customers now from Next Generation Natural Gas
text: Next Generation Natural Gas is sourced from environmentally conscious producers, critical to achieving a sustainable, affordable energy future while reducing greenhouse gas emissions CHATTANOOGA, Tenn. , Aug. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- With a continued commitment to reducing greenhouse gas emissions, Chattanooga Gas announced today that 100% of the natural gas supply for its residential and small business customers is procured, transported or delivered by companies that are reducing their methane emissions.

title: Southern Company reports second-quarter 2023 earnings
text: ATLANTA , Aug. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Southern Company today reported second-quarter earnings of $838 million, or 77 cents per share, in 2023 compared with earnings of $1.1 billion, or $1.04 per share, in the second quarter of 2022. For the six months ended June 30, 2023, Southern Company reported earnings of $1.7 billion, or $1.56 per share, compared with $2.1 billion, or $2.01 per share, for the same period in 2022.

title: Jason Davis Named Vice President of Southeast Division, Jean Lynch Named Vice President of Human Resources
text: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. , Aug. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jason Davis has been named vice president of Alabama Power's Southeast Division, while Jean Lynch has been named the electric utility company's vice president of Human Resources.

title: Southern Company (SO) Q2 Earnings on Deck: What to Expect
text: While new customer additions are likely to have boosted Southern Company's (SO) profit levels in the second quarter, lower fuel and retail electric sales might have offset those gains.
